ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency (e.g., POSW, BTC) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the cryptocurrency's logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the cryptocurrency's website */,
  "twitter_url" TEXT /* URL to the cryptocurrency's Twitter page */,
  "github_url" TEXT /* URL to the cryptocurrency's GitHub page */,
  "reddit_url" TEXT /* URL to the cryptocurrency's Reddit page */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the cryptocurrency was created in the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the cryptocurrency was last updated in the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price data entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "time_unix" TEXT /* Unix timestamp of the data entry */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price during the period */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price during the period */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the cryptocurrency */,
  "marketcap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "trading_volume" REAL /* Trading volume in USD */,
  "circulating_supply" TEXT /* Circulating supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "total_supply" TEXT /* Total supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the data entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the data entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_data_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the exchange */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the exchange's API */,
  "api_secret" TEXT /* API secret for accessing the exchange's API */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the exchange was created in the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the exchange was last updated in the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency */,
  "data_url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., REST API, WebSocket) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the data source was created in the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the data source was last updated in the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, trader, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created in the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated in the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user profile was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created in the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated in the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, view, edit) */,
  "resource_id" TEXT /* ID of the resource accessed */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource accessed (e.g., cryptocurrency, report) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user setting the alert */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Status of the alert (active or inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, custom) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data of the report in JSON format */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
